description: geox-gui cockpit maps directly to af-forge: WellContextDesk embeds LogDock with geox_compute_petrophysics MCP calls; geox_log_interpreter wired to AF-FORGE bridge via /geox/log_interpreter; geox-gui dist built successfully (542KB main JS)

integration.redundancy_resolved: WellContextDesk (in geox-gui) replaces standalone well-desk app; earth3d tab embeds seismic_viewer via iframe; Map tab uses MalayBasinPilotDashboard directly
integration.note: geox-gui is separate repo; cockpit build pushes to Cloudflare Pages via geox-gui CI; AF-FORGE bridge provides /geox/log_interpreter for cockpit's geox_compute_petrophysics MCP chain
